title: Senior Fleet Manager at Wabash National India

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Wabash National India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wabash National India! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!
